hook: Nine tenths of it was never the flat. It was the lease.
caption:
The five-year wave was supposed to make flats cheap. We checked it against our own transaction records.

A flat that has just passed its five-year mark sells about 20% higher per square foot than the rest of its town. It also carries around 95 years of lease. Compare it only against other long-lease flats in the same town and flat type, and the premium falls to about 2%.

Nine tenths of it was never the flat. It was the lease.

Full working at propsight.sg, link in bio. Free, no sign-up.
audio: Sound: punchy, slightly dramatic. Search IG audio for “dramatic reveal” or “punchy beat”, pick a ↑ trending one (under 30s), volume low.

hook: A record number of flats can finally be sold. Does that make them cheaper?
caption:
A record number of Singapore flats passed their five-year mark this year, and the headline everyone repeats is that this makes them cheap. We checked it against our own transaction records.

Newly eligible flats do sell about 20% higher per square foot than the rest of their town. But they also carry around 95 years of lease. Compare them only against other long-lease flats in the same town and flat type and the premium falls to about 2%. Nine tenths of what looks like a freshness premium is simply the lease.

Where most of that stock is actually trading, Tampines and Bukit Batok, it sells 2.5% and 3.0% below comparable flats. That is a few percent of room, not a fire sale.

One more thing worth knowing: the 13,480 figure is an industry compilation, not an HDB release. Different compilers publish different numbers.

Full working at propsight.sg, link in bio. Free, no sign-up.
cap_zh:
今年有创纪录数量的组屋满五年可以转售，人人都说这会让它们变便宜。我们用自己的成交记录核实了一下。

刚满五年的组屋每平方英尺确实比全镇其他单位高出约20%。但它们的剩余屋契也长达约95年。若只与同一市镇、同一房型中屋契同样长的单位相比，这个溢价便收窄至约2%。看似「新净」的溢价，约九成其实只是屋契。

在这类房源成交最活跃的市镇，淡滨尼和武吉巴督，它们比可比单位低2.5%和3.0%。这是几个百分点的空间，而不是抛售。

还有一点值得知道：13,480这个数字是业界自行整理的，并非建屋局发布。不同机构给出的数字并不一致。

完整分析在 propsight.sg，链接在简介。免费，无需注册。
